title: French-Style Turkey Mince Pasta
description: A quick and flavorful pasta dish with lean turkey mince, ideal for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the pasta according to package instructions, then set aside.
In a large pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add the finely chopped onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the turkey mince and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the Italian seasonings and cherry tomatoes to the pan. Stir to combine.
Simmer the mixture for 5-7 minutes, until the flavors have melded together and the tomatoes have broken down.
Combine cooked pasta and the turkey mince mixture. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, topped with grated parmesan cheese.
